description: Der Crystal Quest CQE-SP-00808 Badekugelfilter wird Ihre Haut und Haare weich machen.
feature_bullets: Die gesündesten, erfrischendes Bad-Erlebnis aller Zeiten. Es ist wie Baden im Frühjahr Wasser
Crystal Quest Bad Ball Filter wird geben Sie glatter, weicher Haut und Haar, das ist weniger trocken.
Entfernt Chlor, Chloramine, VOC 's, thm 's, Pestizide, Schwefel, Schwermetalle, Schwefelwasserstoff ("" Geruch), Eisenoxid (Rost Wasser faulen Eiern), Schmutz, Ablagerungen und andere Gerüche
Crystal Quest Bath Ball Filter enthält eine Umkehrbare Filter-Patrone, die hält etwa ein Jahr.
feature_bullets_flat: Es ist pH-neutral. Crystal Quest Bath Ball Filter enthält eine Umkehrbare Filter-Patrone, die hält etwa ein Jahr. Entfernt Chlor, Chloramine, VOC 's, thm 's, Pestizide, Schwefel, Schwermetalle, Schwefelwasserstoff ("" Geruch), Eisenoxid (Rost Wasser faulen Eiern), Schmutz, Ablagerungen und andere Gerüche. Crystal Quest Bad Ball Filter wird geben Sie glatter, weicher Haut und Haar, das ist weniger trocken. Die gesündesten, erfrischendes Bad-Erlebnis aller Zeiten. Es ist wie Baden im Frühjahr Wasser.

top_reviews.body: This bath filter is a game-changer. It was incredibly easy to install and works exactly as advertised. I immediately noticed a difference in the water—it feels much cleaner and "softer" on the skin. If you're dealing with hard water or chlorine smells, I highly recommend this!

date.raw: Bewertet in den USA am7. April 2026

top_reviews.body: Its meant to be one of the best filters to get and it is good BUT it takes a very long time to arrive - its shipped from the US but worse than that, there don't seem to be any replacement filters on sale in the UK. You can order them direct from Crystal Quest in the States but that makes the filters prohibitively expensive and huge delays on delivery....v annoying to find this out after I've purchased the bath filter!!

I didn’t expect to love this bath filter as much as I do — but it made a noticeable difference after just one bath! Living in an area with hard, heavily chlorinated water, my skin always felt dry and itchy after bathing, no matter what products I used. This filter changed that instantly.💧 Skin Feels Softer & Less IrritatedAfter using this for one week, my skin feels smoother and less tight after every bath. I no longer need to slather on thick lotion right away. My daughter also has sensitive skin, and I’ve noticed fewer flare-ups since using this product. That alone made it worth every penny.💡 Easy to Use & AttachThe setup couldn’t be simpler — just hang it under your tub spout and let the water run through it. No complicated installation or tools. It even fits our slightly curved spout just fine.🛁 Water Smells & Feels CleanerThere’s no more heavy chlorine smell, and the water feels silkier somehow. It’s hard to describe, but you can literally feel the difference — like hotel-quality bath water at home.♻️ Eco-Friendly & BPA-FreeI love that it’s BPA-free and built to filter out harmful contaminants without compromising water flow. The design is also sleek and modern — it doesn’t look bulky or awkward in our tub.⸻Final Thoughts:I didn’t realize how much my bath water was affecting my skin until I tried this. I highly recommend it to anyone with skin issues, kids, or simply looking to upgrade their self-care routine at home.

date.raw: Bewertet in den USA am30. Mai 2025

top_reviews.body: Put this filter on our water cabin system....took away the smell and yellow from lake water..feeling soft and clean...Awesome....
